narrative: Dollar retreats on softer US economic data and easing US-Iran geopolitical tensions — DXY +0.05%; gold lower -0.13%; equities +0.58%; VIX 15.7. NZD/JPY bilateral divergence dominates G8 themes as NZD (+1.124% avg) outperforms JPY (-0.453% avg) on a 1.577% spread; 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains USD/JPY at 159.35 despite the broader USD pullback. Options market shows moderate JPY call skew with USD/JPY 25d RR at -1.11 as Tokyo CPI looms. Watch Tokyo CPI at 23:30 UTC for BoJ policy guidance.
